name: grainwatch-fused
description: Modular GrainWatch PH app for Philippine grain monitoring with official-source API integration.

scripts.build:css: npm run build:css:shared && npm run build:css:dashboard && npm run build:css:reports && npm run build:css:markets && npm run build:css:oracle && npm run build:css:alerts && npm run build:css:settings
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check services/cache.js && node --check services/coinbaseRates.js && node --check services/psaPxWeb.js && node --check services/philippineGrains.js && node --check public/js/shared.js && node --check public/js/pages/dashboard.js && node --check public/js/pages/reports.js && node --check public/js/pages/markets.js && node --check public/js/pages/oracle.js && node --check public/js/pages/alerts.js && node --check public/js/pages/settings.js
